failure_details.root_cause: Title extraction from fixtures homepage - snapshot may have empty or formatted differently
failure_details.recommendation: Add retry logic and check snapshot format for title field

failure_details.root_cause: Task addition click may not have matched correct selector or DOM update not reflected in subsequent text extraction
failure_details.recommendation: Verify selectors exist with full snapshot before acting; add DOM update detection

failure_details.root_cause: Login credentials may not authenticate correctly or dashboard redirect not carrying expected keywords
failure_details.recommendation: Test credentials independently; consider profile-based authentication for persistent sessions

failure_details.root_cause: Screenshot API endpoint behavior; may require different request format
failure_details.recommendation: Check API documentation for screenshot endpoint; try with -o parameter

failure_details.root_cause: Page reload may not persist state; localStorage not syncing or page not waiting for re-render
failure_details.recommendation: Add wait/retry loop after reload action; verify localStorage API available

failure_details.root_cause: Financial metrics text patterns don't match dashboard layout (profit, margin, net, EBITDA variants not found)
failure_details.recommendation: Expand text search patterns; check actual dashboard rendering for field names

strengths.content_extraction: Excellent text and snapshot extraction; semantic selectors working perfectly
strengths.error_resilience: Robust handling of 404s, missing elements, no crashes during entire benchmark
strengths.token_efficiency: Compact snapshot format highly effective; text extraction sufficient for most tasks
strengths.form_automation: Multi-field forms, dropdowns, validation all working reliably

recommendations_priority.action: Add retry logic with wait; verify snapshot title format

recommendations_priority.issue: SPA task state not visible after add
recommendations_priority.action: Use full snapshot to verify selectors; add DOM change detection
Test credentials separately; implement profile-based auth for persistence

recommendations_priority.issue: Task persistence not visible after reload
recommendations_priority.action: Add wait/retry after reload action; check localStorage availability
Check endpoint payload format and retry mechanism
Expand text patterns for financial data; verify dashboard rendering
